description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Gcc Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: docker-qbs and linux-qmake. The docker-qbs job uses a Docker image to build and test with Qbs, while the linux-qmake job uses a matrix strategy to test with different host systems, GCC versions, Qt versions, and C++ standards. It caches Qt, installs Qt, sets up GCC, checks out the code, and runs qmake, make, and make check.
